objective: Architectural sign-off for crates.io publication readiness of grove-core and grove workspace crates.
key_changes: Exact version pin in cli/Cargo.toml ensures deterministic resolution on crates.io
bump-version.sh step 3/6 maintains pin synchronization across releases

Expected dry-run failure on grove validates the exact-version dependency is enforced
No impact on existing distribution channels (npm, Homebrew, GitHub Releases)
